approved_command_preview: Corrected direct apply: copy reviewed patch files to temp, check out PR #307 branch, apply runner and selftest patches with whitespace-tolerant git apply, run py_compile and selftest, then push.
command:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$branch = 'codex/issue-306-function-reachability-report'
$runnerPath = 'scripts/openrouter_pr_review_hardened.py'
$selftestPath = 'scripts/openrouter_pr_review_hardened_selftest.py'
$oldRunnerSha = '2ae6c5aa66068a7c7d5b1bb0720b9d50355a6d76'
$oldSelftestSha = '317d863d8b3f94c7b122dc82a9e6573ba3c07833'
$runnerPatchSource = 'ops/requests/apply_patch/dcoir-review-nonactionable-runner-20260624/dcoir-review-nonactionable-runner.patch'
$selftestPatchSource = 'ops/requests/apply_patch/dcoir-review-nonactionable-selftest-20260624/dcoir-review-nonactionable-selftest.patch'
$runnerPatch = Join-Path $env:RUNNER_TEMP 'dcoir-review-nonactionable-runner.patch'
$selftestPatch = Join-Path $env:RUNNER_TEMP 'dcoir-review-nonactionable-selftest.patch'
Copy-Item -LiteralPath $runnerPatchSource -Destination $runnerPatch -Force
Copy-Item -LiteralPath $selftestPatchSource -Destination $selftestPatch -Force
function Invoke-Logged([string[]]$GitArgs) {
  Write-Host "git $($GitArgs -join ' ')"
  $output = & git @GitArgs
  $code = $LASTEXITCODE
  if ($output) { $output | Out-Host }
  if ($code -ne 0) { throw "git failed with exit $code`: git $($GitArgs -join ' ')" }
}
function Get-TrackedBlob([string]$Path) {
  $line = (& git ls-files -s -- $Path)
  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0 -or [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($line)) { throw "Unable to read tracked blob for $Path" }
  return (($line -split '\s+')[1])
}
function Assert-Blob([string]$Path, [string]$Expected) {
  $actual = Get-TrackedBlob -Path $Path
  Write-Host "$Path blob=$actual"
  if ($actual -ne $Expected) { throw "Blob mismatch for $Path expected $Expected got $actual" }
}
function Apply-OnePatch([string]$Patch, [string]$Path, [string]$ExpectedBlob, [string]$Message) {
  Assert-Blob -Path $Path -Expected $ExpectedBlob
  Invoke-Logged @('apply', '--ignore-space-change', '--ignore-whitespace', '--check', '--', $Patch)
  Invoke-Logged @('apply', '--ignore-space-change', '--ignore-whitespace', '--', $Patch)
  Invoke-Logged @('diff', '--check', '--', $Path)
  Invoke-Logged @('add', '--', $Path)
  Invoke-Logged @('commit', '-m', $Message)
}
Invoke-Logged @('fetch', '--no-tags', 'origin', "refs/heads/$branch`:refs/remotes/origin/$branch")
Invoke-Logged @('checkout', '-B', $branch, "origin/$branch")
Invoke-Logged @('config', 'user.name', 'github-actions[bot]')
Invoke-Logged @('config', 'user.email', '41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com')
Apply-OnePatch -Patch $runnerPatch -Path $runnerPath -ExpectedBlob $oldRunnerSha -Message 'Harden dcoir review non-actionable findings'
Apply-OnePatch -Patch $selftestPatch -Path $selftestPath -ExpectedBlob $oldSelftestSha -Message 'Test dcoir review non-actionable finding filter'
Write-Host 'Running validation'
python -m py_compile $runnerPath $selftestPath
if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'py_compile failed' }
python $selftestPath
if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'hardened selftest failed' }
$newRunnerSha = Get-TrackedBlob -Path $runnerPath
$newSelftestSha = Get-TrackedBlob -Path $selftestPath
Write-Host "new runner blob: $newRunnerSha"
Write-Host "new selftest blob: $newSelftestSha"
Invoke-Logged @('push', 'origin', "HEAD:refs/heads/$branch")
Write-Host 'Final branch head:'
Invoke-Logged @('rev-parse', 'HEAD')
